taxonomy: Emilia tenellula is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a member of the genus Emilia, which is a group of small, annual or perennial herbs. The genus Emilia is further classified within the tribe Senecioneae, a group of daisies and sunflowers. This classification suggests that Emilia tenellula shares characteristics with other plants in the Senecioneae tribe. The Asteraceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as composites.
